title: Skims
summary: Skims is an American shapewear and clothing brand co-founded by Kim Kardashian and Jens Grede. The company is valued at over $5 billion as of 2025.
extract: Skims is an American shapewear and clothing brand co-founded by Kim Kardashian and Jens Grede. The company is valued at over $5 billion as of 2025.
